channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Platner withdraws from Senate race following rape allegation
item.description: Graham Platner exited the Maine Senate contest, allowing Democrats to select a new candidate to challenge Senator Susan Collins.

item.title: The Long March out of the Gender Clinics
item.description: It would be nice to see real remorse from those who parroted the false talking points of this movement.

item.title: And the Inaugural âSupreme Flower of Nitwitteryâ Awards Go To . . .
item.description: Judges shouldnât pretend to be curators, Churchill is both big money and purged from money, and Etruscan art looms large in Rome.

item.title: Hereâs What You Need To Know About The Charlie Kirk Assassination Trial, Day 3
item.description: Tyler Robinson turning himself in to authorities and Lance Twiggs' interview with law enforcement were focal points during Wednesday's hearing.
